content:
NOTE: If possible, upload your college/class materials on the contribute page to help fellow students.

🎉 New Updates Available!

📚 New Resources Added:

  • 4th Sem (CSE, ECE)
  • 5th Sem (CSE)
  • 6th Sem (CSE-AIML)

To access them:

  • Navigate to the RESOURCES page
  • Click on the Filter icon
  • Change the semester selection to view the materials
